diagrams.title: Template Classification Tree
diagrams.description: Shows hierarchy of template types in C++
diagrams.purpose: Understanding template types and their relationships

diagrams.title: STL Components Architecture
diagrams.description: Three main components of Standard Template Library
elements: Containers (Sequence: vector,list,deque | Associative: map,set,multimap | Adapters: stack,queue)
Algorithms (Non-modifying: find,count | Modifying: sort,replace,transform | Numeric: accumulate,inner_product)
Iterators (Input, Output, Forward, Bidirectional, Random Access, Raw)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how STL components work together

diagrams.title: Vector Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Dynamic array growth mechanism in std::vector
